words.meaning_en: A large road vehicle that carries many passengers
words.example_sentence: We take the school bus every morning.

words.meaning_en: A vehicle that travels on railway tracks
words.example_sentence: The train arrived at the station on time.

words.meaning_en: A two-wheeled vehicle pedalled by the rider
words.example_sentence: He rides his bicycle to school.

words.meaning_en: A four-wheeled motor vehicle
words.example_sentence: Dad drove us to the market in his car.

words.meaning_en: A vehicle with wings that flies through the air
words.example_sentence: We traveled by aeroplane to Delhi.

words.meaning_en: A small vehicle used for traveling on water
words.example_sentence: The fisherman rowed his boat across the river.

words.meaning_en: A three-wheeled motorized vehicle used as a taxi in India
words.example_sentence: We took an auto-rickshaw to the hospital.

words.meaning_en: A hard hat worn to protect the head
words.example_sentence: Always wear a helmet while riding.

words.meaning_en: A light or sign used to control traffic on roads
words.example_sentence: Stop when the traffic signal turns red.

words.meaning_en: A large vehicle used to transport heavy goods
words.example_sentence: A lorry blocked the road near our school.

words.meaning_en: An underground or overground electric train in a city
words.example_sentence: We took the metro to reach the mall quickly.

words.meaning_en: A ship that can travel underwater
words.example_sentence: The submarine dived deep into the ocean.

words.meaning_en: An aircraft with spinning blades that can hover in the air
words.example_sentence: A helicopter rescued the flood victims.

words.meaning_en: A powerful vehicle used by farmers to plough fields
words.example_sentence: The farmer drove a tractor across the field.

words.meaning_en: A boat that regularly carries people across a river or sea
words.example_sentence: We took a ferry to cross the river.

words.meaning_en: A light vehicle pulled or pedalled by a person
words.example_sentence: He cycled his rickshaw through the narrow lane.

words.meaning_en: A vehicle designed to travel in outer space
words.example_sentence: India launched a spacecraft to the moon.

words.meaning_en: Vehicles moving on roads
words.example_sentence: We were late because of heavy traffic.

words.meaning_en: A main road for fast travel between places
words.example_sentence: The bus sped along the highway.

words.meaning_en: A person who travels in a vehicle but does not drive
words.example_sentence: The train was full of passengers.

words.meaning_en: The money paid to travel by bus, train, or taxi
words.example_sentence: She paid the bus fare and sat down.
